pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for industrial water treatment e-commerce with search, featured categories, and quick links into core shopping flows.
primary_functions: Allow users to search for products via a prominent header search bar (e.g., sediment filters, RO anti-scalant, 4040 RO membranes).
Provide quick navigation links to main product categories such as Cartridge Filters, Pumps, Filter Housings, Systems, Instrumentation, Chemicals, and Salts & Regenerants.
Show featured or popular categories and products to help users start common tasks quickly.
Provide global access to the shopping cart and key informational pages via header and footer.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the main header search form.
Click a featured category tile or a category link in the header navigation.
Click a featured or popular product card on the homepage.
Click the cart icon or 'Cart' link in the header.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Home' link in the header navigation.
Default landing page at the site root (e.g., '/').

pages.name: Category Listing
pages.description: Category browsing page (template) that lists products for a selected top-level category (e.g., cartridge filters, dosing pumps, housings, systems, instrumentation, salts & regenerants, chemicals) with filter and sort controls.
primary_functions: Display products for a selected category using URL parameters (e.g., category.html?categoryId=cartridge_filters, category.html?categoryId=dosing_pumps, category.html?categoryId=filter_housings, category.html?categoryId=water_softeners, category.html?categoryId=instrumentation, category.html?categoryId=salts_regenerants, category.html?categoryId=chemicals).

Provide sidebar filters for technical attributes and options relevant to the category, such as micron rating, length, flow rate, volume/package size, salt rejection, housing material, package weight, price range, rating thresholds, and shipping options (including 'Free shipping').

Provide sorting controls for the product list, including options like Price: Low to High, Price: High to Low, Rating: High to Low, and technical sorts where relevant (e.g., Flow rate: High to Low for pumps).
Enable users to select specific media or type filters (e.g., Sediment, Carbon block/Activated carbon, Digital dosing pumps, Conductivity meters) within the same category page.
Allow users to add products to a comparison list (e.g., for instrumentation and meters) via 'Compare' checkboxes or buttons on product cards.
Provide navigation from each product card to the Product Detail page (product.html?productId=123) while preserving the ability to return with filters intact via back button or breadcrumb.

incoming_params.description: Key of the category to display (e.g., 'cartridge_filters', 'dosing_pumps').
Optional page number for pagination within the category.
Optional sort key (e.g., 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'rating_desc', 'flow_rate_desc').
Optional minimum price filter.
Optional maximum price filter (used in tasks such as setting < $40, $250, $350, $2000, $600).
Optional minimum rating filter (e.g., 4 or 4.5).
Optional flag to filter to free-shipping products only.
Comma-separated micron ratings to filter by (e.g., '1,5').
Comma-separated cartridge or housing lengths in inches (e.g., '10', '20').
Comma-separated media / filter types (e.g., 'sediment,carbon_block,activated_carbon').
Comma-separated material filters for housings (e.g., 'stainless_steel').
Comma-separated pump type filters (e.g., 'digital').
Optional minimum flow rate in m³/h (used for pumps and softeners).
Optional maximum flow rate in m³/h.
Optional minimum volume in liters (e.g., anti-scalant volume).
Optional maximum volume in liters.
Optional minimum package weight in kg (e.g., salts).
Optional maximum package weight in kg (e.g., 25 kg filter for salts).
Optional minimum salt rejection filter for membranes (e.g., 98).
Comma-separated membrane model identifiers (e.g., '4040').
Comma-separated instrument types (e.g., 'conductivity_meter').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a product card within the category list.
Change pagination or sort option.
Apply or change sidebar filters.
Click the 'Compare' button after selecting products for comparison.
Click the cart icon or 'Cart' link in the header.

access_methods.description: Accessed via header category links (e.g., 'Cartridge Filters', 'Pumps', 'Filter Housings', etc.), each passing a different categoryId.
Accessed via links from other pages that pass a categoryId query parameter, such as from breadcrumbs or contextual links.

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Search results page that lists products matching a text query from the header search bar, with relevant filters and sorting.
primary_functions: Display products that match user-entered keywords (e.g., '5 micron sediment filter cartridge', 'RO anti-scalant', '4040 RO membrane') based on URL parameters (e.g., search.html?q=ro_anti_scalant).

Provide sidebar filters similar to category listings, including Micron rating, Length, Volume/Package size, Salt rejection/Rejection rate, Price range, Rating thresholds, Shipping options (including 'Free shipping'), and other relevant technical filters.
Provide sorting controls for the search results (e.g., Price: Low to High, Price: High to Low, Rating, technical sorts where applicable).
Allow adding products to a comparison list (where relevant) and navigating to Product Detail pages from search result product cards.
Allow users to refine their search by adjusting filters without leaving the page.

incoming_params.description: Search query string entered by the user (e.g., 'RO anti-scalant').
Optional page number for paginated search results.
Optional sort key (e.g., 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'rating_desc').
Optional minimum price filter.
Optional maximum price filter (used in tasks like setting < $40, $250, $350).
Optional minimum rating filter (e.g., 4 or 4.5).
Optional flag to filter only free-shipping products.
Comma-separated micron ratings for cartridge-related search queries.
Comma-separated length filters in inches.
Comma-separated media / filter type values.
Comma-separated material names (e.g., 'stainless_steel').
Comma-separated pump type filters.
Optional minimum flow rate filter for pump/system queries.
Optional maximum flow rate filter.
Optional minimum volume filter in liters.
Optional maximum volume filter in liters.
Optional minimum package weight in kg.
Optional maximum package weight in kg.
Optional minimum salt rejection filter for membrane searches.
Comma-separated instrument types (e.g., 'conductivity_meter').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Change pagination or sorting options in search results.
Apply or adjust sidebar filters to refine search results.
Click on a product card in the search results.
Click 'Compare' after adding products to the comparison list from search results.
Click the cart icon or 'Cart' link in the header.

access_methods.description: Reached when the user submits the search form on the header from any page.
Can be accessed directly with a q query string (e.g., search.html?q=4040+RO+membrane).

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Individual product detail page for any SKU (filter cartridges, pumps, membranes, housings, salts, chemicals, meters) with full specifications and add-to-cart controls.
primary_functions: Display full product information, including name, images, price, rating, technical specifications (e.g., micron rating, length, flow rate, volume, salt rejection percentage, measurement range, material), and shipping details.
Provide a quantity input field where users can set the desired quantity (e.g., 2 sediment cartridges, 3 RO anti-scalant containers, 3 RO membranes, 3 salt bags, or 4 housings).
Allow users to add the configured quantity of the product to the cart with an 'Add to cart' button.

Provide breadcrumb navigation back to the originating Category Listing or Search Results page so users can resume their filtered/sorted product browsing (e.g., returning to cartridge filters after adding one stage of a 3-stage set).
Optionally allow adding the product to comparison (for suitable categories like instruments) directly from the detail page.

incoming_params.description: Product ID whose details are to be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View cart' after adding a product to the cart, or click the cart icon in the header.
Click on a category-level breadcrumb link in the product breadcrumb trail.
Click a 'View comparison' link after adding the product to the comparison list.

access_methods.description: Accessed via links that pass a product ID in the query string (product.html?id=123).

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page summarizing all items the user intends to purchase, with controls to adjust quantities, remove items, and proceed to checkout.
primary_functions: List all items currently in the cart with product name, key attributes (e.g., size, micron rating), unit price, quantity, and line total.
Allow users to change quantities for each line item (e.g., set dosing pump quantity to 1, adjust filter housing quantity from 1 to 4, set membrane quantity to 3) and update the cart totals.
Allow users to remove individual line items (e.g., remove the more expensive of two stainless housings).
Show cart subtotal and indicative shipping information (including free-shipping flags when applicable).
Provide clear calls-to-action to proceed to checkout (checkout.html) or continue shopping (returning to previous category or home).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the 'Proceed to checkout' button.
Click a product name or image within the cart line item to view its details.
Click a 'Continue shopping' link that returns to the homepage.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Cart' link or cart icon in the header.
Can be opened directly at cart.html to view current cart state.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Checkout page where users review their order summary, provide shipping and contact details, select a shipping method, and place the order.
primary_functions: Display an order summary of the current cart contents, including products, quantities, prices, and totals.
Collect necessary customer details such as shipping address, contact information, and any notes (kept high-level for this design).
Allow users to select or review shipping options, including any free-shipping choices where available.
Provide a confirmation action to place the order and show final total cost before submission.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Shipping & returns policy' link from the checkout page.
Click a 'Terms & Conditions' link from the checkout page.
Click a 'Back to cart' link if the user wants to adjust cart items.

access_methods.description: Accessed primarily by clicking 'Proceed to checkout' from cart.html.

pages.name: Product Comparison
pages.description: Comparison page showing a side-by-side table of selected products (especially conductivity meters) to help users choose the best option.
primary_functions: Display a comparison table of selected products added from category or search pages, showing key attributes such as measurement range, maximum conductivity, accuracy, price, rating, and other relevant specifications.
Highlight or make it easy to identify the product with the widest measurement range or highest maximum conductivity value.
Provide 'Add to cart' buttons for each product within the comparison table and, where necessary, a quantity field (defaulting to 1) for quick cart addition.
Allow users to remove individual products from the comparison list or return to the previous listing page to add different products for comparison.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product name or image within the comparison table.
Click 'View cart' after adding a compared item to the cart.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Compare' buttons or links from category or search pages after adding products to the comparison list.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Company overview page describing the business, expertise, and industries served in industrial water treatment.
primary_functions: Explain the companys background, experience, and specialization in water treatment systems and components.
Clarify the types of customers served (e.g., small hotels, industrial users, facilities managers).
Build trust by outlining quality standards, certifications, and supplier relationships.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Contact us' call-to-action on the About page.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' link in the footer.
Can be opened directly at about.html.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page with contact details and a form for sales or technical support inquiries.
primary_functions: Provide a simple contact form for inquiries about products, orders, or technical support.
Display contact details such as phone numbers, support email addresses, and physical address if relevant.
Offer clear expectations for response times and available support hours.

incoming_params.description: Optional topic preset for the contact form (e.g., 'order', 'technical_support', 'returns').
Optional order reference to pre-fill in the contact form when contacting about a specific order.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the contact form; page remains while showing a success message.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact' link in the footer.
Can be opened directly at contact.html and may include optional topic/order_reference parameters.
Contact form submissions are handled on the same page using submitContactForm.

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Help center and FAQ page addressing common questions on ordering, shipping, returns, payments, and using site features like filters and comparison.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about ordering, shipping, returns, and payment options.
Explain how to use key site features such as filters, comparison, and cart management.
Provide guidance on selecting appropriate water treatment products (e.g., choosing micron sizes or pump capacities) at a high level.

incoming_params.description: Optional section key to focus on a specific topic (e.g., 'ordering', 'shipping', 'returns', 'filters_and_comparison').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Contact support' link from a specific FAQ entry.
Click a 'Learn more about shipping & returns' link from shipping-related FAQs.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Help & FAQ' link in the footer.
Can be opened directly at help.html, optionally with a section query parameter.

pages.name: Shipping & Returns
pages.description: Policy page explaining shipping methods, free-shipping criteria, delivery coverage, and returns/returns fees.
primary_functions: Explain shipping methods, delivery times, and geographic coverage.
Define free shipping criteria and how free shipping is applied and displayed in product listings and filters.
Describe the returns and exchanges process, including any restocking fees or conditions.

incoming_params.description: Optional section identifier to scroll to a specific area (e.g., 'free_shipping', 'returns').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'View FAQs about shipping' link.
Click a 'Contact us about a return' link.
Click a 'Back to checkout' link after reviewing shipping options.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Shipping & Returns' link in the footer.
Can be opened directly at shipping.html, optionally with a section query parameter.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Legal page describing how user data and privacy are handled, including data collection, usage, retention, and user rights.
primary_functions: Describe what user data is collected and how it is used.
Explain data retention, protection measures, and rights related to personal data.
Provide contact details for privacy-related inquiries.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Contact us about privacy' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer.
Can be opened directly at privacy.html.

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms page governing website usage and the purchase of products, including warranties and liability.
primary_functions: Outline the terms of sale, including pricing, warranties, and liability limitations.
Define general website usage terms, including acceptable use and intellectual property notices.
Explain dispute resolution procedures and governing law.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Back to checkout' link after reviewing terms while ordering.
Click a 'Contact us about terms' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Terms & Conditions' link in the footer.
Can be opened directly at terms.html.

header_links.description: Homepage with search and featured water treatment categories
All cartridge filters including sediment and carbon cartridges
Dosing pumps including digital dosing pumps
Filter housings including stainless steel housings
Complete water softener systems and related packages
Water quality instrumentation including conductivity meters
RO anti-scalants and other water treatment chemicals
Water softener salts and regenerants (e.g., 25 kg bags)
View and edit current shopping cart

footer_links.description: Learn more about the company and its water treatment expertise
Frequently asked questions and basic site usage help
Shipping information, free shipping criteria, and return policy
Details on how user data and privacy are handled
Terms of sale and website usage conditions
